suggestions.name: NumberParser

suggestions.name: BigDecimalConverter

suggestions.name: DoubleConverter

suggestions.name: NumericComparator

suggestions.name: NumberComparator
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit focused on comparing numeric values to find minimum and maximum values across different primitive types. Extracting them into a NumberComparator class improves code
